top_signals.title: China Unveils Nuclear-Powered Floating Hub for Zero-Emission Shipping
top_signals.summary: China has proposed a large offshore logistics platform powered by nuclear energy that would function as both a cargo transfer hub and a refuelling/charging centre for ships, according to the South China Morning Post. The concept, unveiled by Jiangnan Shipyard, combines port infrastructure, energy generation, and cargo handling into a single floating facility aimed at reducing emissions in maritime transport. The project was presented at the Posidonia International Shipping Exhibition in Greece. The SCMP writes that the platform would rely on a…

top_signals.title: Ashley’s Frasers Offers to Buy Hugo Boss in $3.1 Billion Deal

top_signals.title: Acta Marine takes delivery of third methanol dual-fuel vessel
top_signals.summary: Rotterdam-headquartered maritime transport company Acta Marine has taken delivery of the third of four-methanol dual-fuel construction service operation vessels (CSOVs) being built by Turkish shipbuilder Tersan Shipyard. CSOVs are purpose-built offshore vessels designed to support the installation, maintenance and operation of offshore energy infrastructure, particularly offshore wind farms. The vessel, Acta Gemini, is fitted with ...

top_signals.summary: Lloyd’s Register Group (LR) and Lloyd’s Register Foundation (The Foundation) are delighted to announce the appointment of the new chair of its boards.
